---
title: "🗓️ Unit 12 - Gaussian Process Boosting"
---

This week we will get to know **GPBoost*, a hybrid machine learning algorithm that combines tree-boosting with Gaussian processes (GPs) or mixed-effects models.


## 👨‍🏫 Lecture  


[Gaussian Process Boosting](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1lVx_krSmBI-HmlNUM1EiFGZOIxeBZLXI/view?usp=sharing)


## Examen No. 2

- See last slide of the lecture above and start working

## Recommended reading

- [Gaussian Processes: not quite for dummies](https://thegradient.pub/gaussian-process-not-quite-for-dummies/)


- [GPBoost documentation](https://gpboost.readthedocs.io/en/latest/index.html)

## ✍️ Coursework

🚧   
Keep doing the exercises for your *Informe No. 2*.
🚧
